footer_brand_tagline: Earn rewards by participating in surveys and research studies
home_hero_lead: EarnMaze pays you for the things you already do — quick surveys, daily quizzes, casual games, and brand offers. Real cash to PayPal or gift cards. From $10.
home_hero_mock_quiz_question: Which country has the most time zones?
home_how_title: Three moves. That's the whole thing.
home_how_lead: No courses, no subscriptions, no funnels. Quick actions that put real points in your wallet — every single day.
home_how_step1_body: 30 seconds. No credit card. Tell us your interests and we'll personalize your dashboard.
home_how_step2_body: Surveys, quizzes, games, deals, and streaks. Each action stacks into points and a streak bonus.
home_how_step3_body: PayPal or gift cards. Most payouts land within 24 hours. No fees, no hidden minimums.
home_earn_lead: Mix and match however you like. Every action adds real points directly to your balance — no point conversions, no expiring credits.
home_earn_card1_body: Show up daily, earn bonus multipliers. The longer your streak, the bigger your rewards.
home_earn_card2_body: Fun, bite-sized quizzes on trending topics — pop culture, science, history, sports.
home_earn_card3_body: Hand-picked interactive experiences — explore, play with, and learn from curated data and lifestyle stories.
home_earn_card4_body: Level up in mobile games and earn real rewards. Gaming meets earning.
home_earn_card5_body: Share opinions with major brands. Quick 2–10 minute surveys matched to your profile.
home_earn_card6_body: Limited-time challenges with bonus point pools and massive reward drops.
home_dash_lead: A real-time view of progress, streaks, and where your rewards come from. One screen, no noise.
home_games_lead: Trivia, scratchers, daily spins. Climb the leaderboard, claim the weekly bonus pool.
home_games_bonus_desc: Claim your free spin and bonus coins
home_streaks_lead: Build daily and weekly streaks that compound your earnings. Hit milestones, unlock bonus pools, protect your run with shields.
home_streaks_feat3: Monthly challenges with massive reward pools
home_streaks_feat4: Streak Shields protect your progress when life happens
home_quiz_lead: Fresh quizzes every day across topics you actually care about. Answer questions, earn instant points, expand your mind.
home_quiz_feat2: Earn 50–200 pts per quiz, with streak bonuses
home_quiz_mock_explanation: France spans 12 time zones across its overseas territories.
home_refer_lead: Invite friends and earn bonus points for every active referral. Climb tiers for bigger rewards.
home_refer_link_desc: You both earn 500 bonus points when they complete their first survey. No cap.
home_why_lead: A daily engagement platform — not another survey wall. We reward consistency, not click-volume.
home_why_r1_body: No sky-high thresholds. Withdraw to PayPal or gift cards starting at ten dollars.
home_why_r2_body: Most withdrawals processed within a single business day. No 4-week holds.
home_why_r3_body: The more consistent you are, the more you earn. Up to 5× bonus multipliers.
home_why_r4_body: Daily quizzes mean you're growing knowledge — not tapping mindlessly.
home_why_r5_body: Industry-standard encryption. We never sell your data. Privacy is non-negotiable.
home_why_r6_body: AI-matched surveys, quizzes tuned to interests, deals based on what you actually buy.
home_reviews_r1_body: The streak system is addictive in the best way. 47 days in and earning way more than any other rewards app — $180 this month.
home_reviews_r2_body: Love the daily quizzes. I look forward to opening the app every morning. Geography and science are my favorite — smarter and paid.
home_reviews_r3_body: Way better than other reward apps. Surveys + streaks + quizzes keep things fresh. First $50 gift card in just two weeks.
home_reviews_r4_body: Weekly trivia tournament had a 50K pool. Placed 12th, got $25 in bonus. The community vibe is real.
home_reviews_r5_body: Perfect for a stay-at-home mom. Quizzes during nap time, surveys after dinner. Streak Shield saved me twice. $320 total so far.
home_faq_a1: Complete at least one earning action per day to build your streak. Multipliers start at 1× and climb to 5× by day 30. Streak Shields protect your progress if you miss a day.
home_faq_q2: What kind of quizzes are available?
home_faq_a2: Fresh quizzes daily across 12+ categories including pop culture, science, geography, sports, history, and tech. Each takes 1–3 minutes and earns 50–200 points.
home_faq_q3: How fast can I cash out?
home_faq_a3: Request a payout once your wallet hits $10. Choose PayPal or gift cards. Most payments processed within 24 hours.
home_faq_a4: 100% free. No subscription, no credit card, no hidden costs. Brand partnerships fund the rewards.
home_faq_a5: Trivia Quiz, Word Scramble, Spin the Wheel, Scratch Cards, Quiz Sprint, and Daily Challenges. New games added regularly with seasonal events.
home_faq_a6: We use industry-standard encryption and never sell personal data. Every payout is human-reviewed for fraud prevention.
home_cta2_lead: Join 4.2 million US members getting paid for streaks, quizzes, surveys, games, and deals — every single day.
home_footer_tagline: Turning everyday moments into real rewards. Streaks, quizzes, surveys, games, and deals — all in one wallet.
home_footer_news_desc: Tips, new features, and earning hacks. Twice a month, never more.
home_notif_empty: No notifications yet. Complete today's tile in any section to earn your first points.
home_fb_thanks_body: It just landed with our team. We appreciate you helping make Earnmaze better.
home_fb_subheading: Tell us what's working and what we can do better.
home_fb_note: We read every message. Usually reply within 24h.
home_refearn_invite_sub: Both of you earn when your friend joins and reaches their first payout.
home_refearn_reward_desc: They get 1,000 pts to start. No limit on invites.
home_refearn_auth_sub: You'll need an account to send invites and collect your referral rewards.
home_refearn_consent_prefix: I am 18 or older and agree to the
home_refearn_note: Free forever. No credit card. US members only.
home_meta_title: EarnMaze — Earn Rewards for Your Opinions
home_meta_description: Daily streaks, brain-boosting quizzes, paid surveys, games & exclusive deals — all rewarding you with real, redeemable points.
home_hero_badge: Earn rewards in your spare time
home_hero_subtitle: Complete quick surveys, earn points instantly, and redeem them for gift cards from top brands. It takes just minutes to start.
home_step_1_desc: Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card needed, ever.
home_step_2_desc: Answer questions matched to your profile. Each takes 5-15 min.
home_step_3_desc: Redeem points for gift cards from top brands. Fast and easy.
home_feature_payouts_desc: Earn points for every completed survey, with rates that reflect your time.
home_feature_fast_desc: Redeem points for gift cards as soon as you hit the threshold. Most are processed within a few business days.
home_feature_smart_desc: Our algorithm finds surveys you'll actually qualify for.
home_feature_quick_desc: Most surveys take 5-10 minutes. Earn during your lunch break.
home_cta_subtitle: Turn spare minutes into real rewards. Free to join, no subscription.
auth_login_meta_description: Sign in to your EarnMaze account to access your dashboard and start earning rewards.
auth_login_subheading: Sign in to your EarnMaze account
auth_security_check_msg: Please complete the security check below.
auth_verification_timeout: Verification timed out. Please refresh and try again.
auth_login_hero_subtitle: Sign back into your Earnmaze wallet and keep your streak alive. Every day you skip resets the multiplier.
auth_login_card_subtitle: Welcome back. Let's keep that streak.
auth_register_meta_description: Create your EarnMaze account and start earning rewards through daily streaks, quizzes, polls, games and deals.
auth_register_subheading: Join EarnMaze and start earning rewards
auth_consent_age: I confirm I am at least 18 years old.
auth_consent_marketing: Send me product updates and offers from EarnMaze. You can opt out any time.
auth_register_hero_subtitle: Take 30 seconds to create your free account and pick up a 250-point welcome bonus. No subscription. No commitment.
auth_register_feat_cashout: Cash out via PayPal or gift cards from just $10
auth_register_feat_privacy: Data encrypted & never sold — privacy first
auth_register_ref_when: when both of you earn first $5.
auth_register_terms_suffix: , and confirm I'm 18+ and a US resident.
auth_forgot_subheading: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth_generic_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth_forgot_sent_body: If an account with this email exists, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
auth_forgot_didnt_receive: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try again.
auth_security_link_expiry_notice: For your security, password reset links expire after 1 hour.
auth_reset_subheading: Create a new secure password for your account.
auth_reset_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth_reset_consent_required: Please confirm age and accept the Terms and Privacy Policy
auth_reset_invalid_link_body: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth_reset_success_body: Your password has been reset. Redirecting to login...
about_meta_description: Learn about EarnMaze - Professional survey platform for earning rewards through research participation.
about_subheading: Your gateway to earning rewards through meaningful research participation
about_mission_para1: EarnMaze Panel is dedicated to making market research more efficient, accurate, and rewarding for everyone involved. We bridge the gap between researchers seeking quality data and individuals who want to share their opinions while earning meaningful rewards.
about_mission_para2: Our platform leverages advanced technology to ensure high-quality data collection while providing a seamless experience for both researchers and respondents.
about_quality_desc: Every response matters. Our quality assurance systems ensure reliable data.
about_pillar_secure_desc: Your data is protected with enterprise-grade security and industry-standard privacy practices.
about_pillar_fast_desc: Streamlined processes that save time for researchers and respondents alike.
about_pillar_user_desc: Designed with the user experience as our top priority for maximum engagement.
about_cta_subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust EarnMaze for their research needs
contact_meta_description: Get in touch with EarnMaze. Reach our support, privacy, or business teams directly via email.
contact_subheading: Pick the right team below — we usually reply within one business day.
contact_support_desc: Account issues, surveys, payouts, or anything else as a panelist.
contact_privacy_desc: Data access, deletion, or any other privacy-related question.
contact_business_desc: Run surveys, partnerships, or media inquiries.
contact_response_time: Most messages get a response within one business day. Please include relevant details (account email, survey name, dates) to help us help you faster.
sb_logout_body: You'll need to log in again to access your account.
dash_no_surveys: We'll let you know when new surveys drop
dash_info_how: Complete surveys to earn points. Redeem your points for gift cards from top brands. Check available surveys below!
dash_info_threshold: You're earning great! Keep going — most gift cards start at 500 points.
dash_welcome_desc: Complete your first survey to start earning points. It only takes a few minutes.
dash_referral_desc: Share your link and earn when they sign up
dash_activity_empty_desc: Complete a survey to get started
disc_hero_desc: Your daily earns are ready. Keep your streak alive and grab today's quiz.
disc_streak_desc: Show up daily for bigger multipliers
disc_quiz_question: Which planet in our solar system has the most moons?
disc_way_streaks_desc: Show up daily, earn bonus multipliers. The longer your streak, the bigger your rewards.
disc_way_quizzes_desc: Fun, bite-sized quizzes on trending topics — pop culture, science, history, sports.
disc_way_artifacts_desc: Hand-picked interactive experiences — explore, play with, and learn from curated stories.
disc_way_games_desc: Level up in mobile games and earn real rewards. Gaming meets earning.
disc_way_deals_desc: Cashback on everyday purchases and app sign-ups you'd already do.
disc_way_challenges_desc: Limited-time challenges with bonus point pools and massive reward drops.
disc_challenge_desc: Answer 10 daily quizzes correctly to unlock a 2,000-pt bonus pool.
sec_empty_desc: Curated experiences will appear here as soon as they're published.
sec_cta_desc: Every item you open earns points. New ones drop every week.
sec_footer_curated: Curated weekly · Fresh items every week
sec_kind_streaks_lead: Keep your streak alive across {n}+ daily check-ins and unlock bigger payouts the longer you stay consistent.
sec_kind_quizzes_lead: Bite-sized trivia across {n}+ categories. Answer, build a streak, cash out — no downloads, no nonsense.
sec_kind_weekly_challenges_lead: Fresh challenges across {n}+ categories every week — complete them for outsized point rewards.
sec_kind_exclusive_deals_lead: Hand-picked deals and cashback offers across {n}+ categories — curated and updated regularly.
sec_kind_artifacts_lead: Interactive experiences across {n}+ categories — explore, engage, and earn points for every one.
games_hero_lead: HTML5 games, instant load, real money on the line. Tap, play, cash out — no downloads, no nonsense.
games_weekend_desc: {n} players. One prize pool. Highest score by Sunday midnight takes it all.
games_how_step1_desc: {n} HTML5 titles. Load in <2s. Nothing to download or install.
games_how_step2_desc: Standard rules. Standard fun. The longer you survive, the bigger the reward.
games_how_step3_desc: Score updates your balance instantly. No waiting, no minimums, no caps.
games_how_step4_desc: Convert at 100 pts = $1. Gift cards, PayPal, crypto — same day, no fees.
games_faq_q1: Are these games actually free to play?
games_faq_a1: 100% free. No subscription, no in-game purchases. Every minute you play counts toward your points balance.
games_faq_a2: Each game has a reward range. Your score, time survived, and difficulty multiplier determine the exact points awarded.
games_faq_a3: No hard daily cap. We do throttle very repetitive sessions to keep the leaderboard fair, but normal play has no limit.
games_faq_q4: What's the minimum to cash out?
games_faq_a4: Cash out at 1,000 pts ($10). PayPal, gift cards, or crypto — your choice. Most payouts process within 24 hours.
games_faq_a5: Yes. Every game is touch-optimized. Same balance and leaderboard across web, iOS, and Android.
games_cta_desc: Join in. Your first game's free, your first cash-out is in 15 minutes.
ps_meta_description: Share opinions with major brands and earn $0.50–$5 per survey. Quick 2–10 minute surveys matched to your profile.
ps_lead: Quick 2–10 minute surveys matched to your profile — from major brands paying $0.50–$5 per survey.
ps_empty_desc: New surveys are added regularly — check back soon.
ps_default_desc: Share your opinion and earn points instantly.
ps_cta_desc: New surveys added weekly. Earn points redeemable for real rewards.
ps_footer_updated: Surveys updated regularly · New ones every week
hdr_referrals_desc: Invite friends and earn bonus points
hist_info: View your complete activity log. Filter by surveys, points, or rewards. Green amounts are earned, red are spent or deducted.
hist_empty_all: Start completing surveys to build your history.
pts_meta_description: Track your points balance and transaction history.
pts_info: Points are earned by completing surveys. Available = your spendable balance. Lifetime = total ever earned. Redeemed = points exchanged for gift cards.
ref_info: Share your referral link with friends. When they sign up and complete their first survey, you both earn bonus points!
ref_invite_desc: Share your link and earn bonus points
ref_step1_desc: Send your referral link to friends
ref_step2_desc: They create an account and complete a survey
ref_step3_desc: You both receive bonus points automatically
ref_empty_desc: Share your link to start earning bonus points
svy_meta_description: Browse available surveys and view your survey completion history.
svy_info: Click 'Start' on any survey to begin earning. You'll be redirected to the survey — once done, points are credited automatically. Partial credit may apply for terminated or quota-full surveys.
svy_empty_desc: Check back later for new earning opportunities.
svy_default_desc: Complete this survey to earn points.
svy_history_empty_desc: Complete your first survey to build your history.
svy_toast_screened_out: You were screened out of this survey.
prof_info: Complete your profile to get matched with more relevant surveys. The more we know about you, the better surveys we can offer — and more points you'll earn.
prof_demographics_desc: Helps match you with relevant surveys
prof_notif_desc: How you'd like to be notified
prof_marketing_desc: Promotional offers and product updates (separate from transactional emails)
prof_marketing_off: You will not receive promotional emails
prof_marketing_disclaimer: Transactional emails (verification codes, password resets, redemption confirmations) are sent regardless of this setting — they're required for the service to function.
rwd_info: Click 'Redeem' on any reward to submit a redemption request. Our team reviews requests and processes them within 24-48 hours. Track your request status in 'My Redemptions'.
rwd_no_rewards_desc: Check back later for new reward opportunities.
rwd_tip_1: Complete surveys regularly to maximize earnings
rwd_tip_2: Look for high-value surveys with bonus points
rwd_tip_3: Provide quality responses to unlock more opportunities
rwd_confirm_otp_note: A verification code will be sent to your registered email. Your gift card will also be delivered to the same email.
rwd_otp_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
rwd_otp_expires: Code expires in 5 minutes. Your gift card will be sent to the same email.
rwd_success_track_note: You can track your redemption status above. We'll process it shortly.
rwd_confirm_cancel_msg: Cancel this redemption? Your points will be refunded.
sup_new_ticket_desc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible
sup_form_required: Please fill in both subject and message.
sup_form_failed_retry: Failed to submit ticket. Please try again.
sup_help_subtitle: Find answers or create a ticket
sup_no_faqs_desc: Check back later or create a support ticket.
sup_no_tickets_desc: Didn't find your answer in the FAQ?

help_meta_description: Get help with your EarnMaze account, payouts, surveys, and privacy. Contact our support team or browse common questions.
help_subheading: Browse common questions below, or reach out directly — we usually reply within one business day.
help_tickets_desc: Already have an account? Open a ticket from your dashboard for the fastest response.
